bytes.topic: Networking — Retrofit, OkHttp, Kotlin serialization, error handling
bytes.title: Jetpack Compose — Efficiently Handling Network Errors with Retrofit
bytes.body: When using Retrofit with OkHttp in Jetpack Compose, you can handle network errors by creating a custom ExceptionHandler. This can be done by creating a class that implements the Retrofit2.CallAdapter.Factory interface. Then, in your Compose app, you can use the CoroutineScope to handle the network call and its potential errors. To demonstrate this, consider the following code snippet.
